description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:1.11.2-alpine3.8 Docker image, and define variables ARTIFACTS_DIR=artifacts and REPO_NAME=gitlab.com/diamondburned/noschat. Set a global before_script that runs apk add --no-cache git gcc musl-dev, creates the directory ${GOPATH}/src/${REPO_NAME}, creates ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/${ARTIFACTS_DIR}, copies the project files into the Go source directory, and changes to that directory. Define a single build stage and a compile job that runs in this stage, executing the script commands: ls, go get, and time go build --ldflags '-linkmode external -extldflags "-static"' -o ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/noschat. Configure the compile job to archive the built binary ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/noschat as an artifact.
